body.title: Wire BaseDevice (ADC) to inherit DiagnosticBase
body.result: BaseDevice(DiagnosticBase, ABC) — all devices call super().__init__(), loguru sink wired, module-level log removed
body.description:
ADC's BaseDevice currently imports only Stopwatch from diagnostic_base, does not inherit DiagnosticBase. Wiring in the inheritance means all ADC devices get the JSON log sink automatically.

BaseDevice(ABC) → BaseDevice(DiagnosticBase, ABC). Stopwatch is already available via DiagnosticBase.stopwatch(). Remove the direct Stopwatch import.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/device.py
**Design rules:** none (ADC portable substrate)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: device.py inheritance change. Out of scope: migrating individual device log calls.
**Test plan:** Run ADC test suite. Verify a BaseDevice subclass produces JSON log files.
